name: imagegen
description: Generate and edit bitmap images with Codex, with optional CLI controls for API-backed workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and edit image assets with Codex
interface.longDescription: Create or edit raster images with Codex's built-in image tool, shape production-ready prompts, handle project assets, and opt into API-backed CLI controls when needed.
